tasks.intent: Open an issue to ask their plans on adding Python 3.11 related resources in awesome-python.

value.title: Python 3.11 resources: Any plans to add?
value.description: Hello! Are there any plans to add Python 3.11 specific resources (e.g. libraries, features, tutorials) to awesome-python? The new features in 3.11 are very exciting and it would be great to have a section or tags for 3.11-related tools and guides.

tasks.intent: Open a new issue to discuss the implementation of dark mode

value.title: Discuss Implementation of Dark Mode
value.body: I would like to propose the addition of a dark mode to the Solarized Prism Theme project. This issue is intended for discussing requirements, design considerations, and implementation strategies for introducing dark mode support. What are the key considerations and potential challenges? Are there any preferred approaches or constraints for the implementation?
